pre_scoring_visibility_statement: REQUIRED: Replace this entire string with a factual account of what you were and were not allowed to see before you began entering scores and cell_rationales. Explicitly address: (1) Evaluator A matrix g9_experience_score_matrix.json — seen or not; (2) Evaluator A per-cell rationales — seen or not; (3) any A-vs-B delta or reconciliation material — seen or not; (4) any prior Evaluator B matrix in the repository — seen or not. If any exception was approved, name who approved it and when.
independence_assessment: REPLACE: e.g. human_external_independent | human_same_org_separate_analyst | isolated_automated_workflow — must be consistent with pre_scoring_visibility_statement. Do not claim roadmap Level B independence unless your process truly satisfies it.

source_grounding.primary_evidence: Frozen scenario JSON files supplied in the handoff package for audit_run_id g9_level_a_fullsix_20260410.
source_grounding.script_grounding_note: REPLACE: State whether you used the PDF; if yes, how it informed expectations (tone, status, escalation) without inventing lines not in the JSON.

independence_and_process.authorship_of_handoff_instructions: REPLACE: who authored the instruction package you received
independence_and_process.who_generated_scores_and_rationales: REPLACE: your name or pseudonymous id
independence_and_process.process_note: REPLACE: steps taken (tools, sessions, breaks), order of work, when raw matrix was frozen
independence_and_process.authorship_process_separation_note: REPLACE: confirm instruction author vs scorer separation as applicable
independence_and_process.english_limitation_statement: REPLACE: constraints (time, language, partial PDF read, no repo access, etc.)
